/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ExpressionParser.dir/src/lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExpressionParser.dir/src/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExpressionParser.dir/src/evaluator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExpressionParser.dir/imgui/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExpressionParser.dir/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExpressionParser.dir/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExpressionParser.dir/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExpressionParser.dir/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExpressionParser.dir/imgui/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ExpressionParser.dir/imgui/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o ExpressionParser.app/Contents/MacOS/ExpressionParser  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo
